title: Official seal
doc_html:
§181.1.  Official seal

The parish recorder shall have an official seal, which shall be attached to all acts, certificates, and other instruments, executed or granted by the clerk of court.

Acts 2006, No. 621, §5, eff. June 23, 2006.
